info.name: Get Statistics About Endpoint Requests

params.name: applicationId
params.description: ID associated with the application

params.name: statGrouping
params.description: Field to group the statistics by

params.name: duration
params.description: Duration in milliseconds

params.name: end
params.description: End of time range in milliseconds since epoch

params.name: resolution
params.description: Resolution in milliseconds

params.name: versionFilter
params.description: Filters the stats to a particular experience version

params.name: domainFilter
params.description: Filters the stats to a particular experience domain or slug

params.name: statusCodeFilter
params.description: Filters the stats to a particular status code

params.name: endpointIdFilter
params.description: Filters the stats to a particular endpoint

info.name: Returns the Experience Groups for an Application

params.name: applicationId
params.description: ID associated with the application

params.name: sortField
params.description: Field to sort the results by

params.name: sortDirection
params.description: Direction to sort the results by

params.name: page
params.description: Which page of results to return

params.name: perPage
params.description: How many items to return per page

params.name: filterField
params.description: Field to filter the results by. Blank or not provided means no filtering.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter to apply against the filtered field. Supports globbing. Blank or not provided means no filtering.

params.name: query
params.description: Experience group filter JSON object which overrides the filter and filterField fields.

info.name: Returns the Experience Users for an Application

params.name: applicationId
params.description: ID associated with the application

params.name: sortField
params.description: Field to sort the results by

params.name: sortDirection
params.description: Direction to sort the results by

params.name: page
params.description: Which page of results to return

params.name: perPage
params.description: How many items to return per page

params.name: filterField
params.description: Field to filter the results by. Blank or not provided means no filtering.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter to apply against the filtered field. Supports globbing. Blank or not provided means no filtering.

params.name: experienceGroupId
params.description: Filter users to those only in the specified group, special experienceGroupIds of 'any' which will give users who are in at least one group and 'none' will give you users who are not in any groups.

params.name: includeAncestorGroups
params.description: If set will include members from ancestors of the specified experienceGroupId

params.name: query
params.description: Experience user filter JSON object which overrides all other filter params.

items.docs: Returns the Experience Users for an Application

info.name: Deletes Multiple Parts of an Experience Including Users, Groups, Slugs, Domains, Versions, Endpoints, Views, and Workflows

params.name: applicationId
params.description: ID associated with the application

params.name: keepUsers
params.description: If this is set, Experience Users will not be removed.

params.name: keepGroups
params.description: If this is set, Experience Groups will not be removed.

params.name: keepSlugs
params.description: If this is set, Experience Slugs will not be removed.

params.name: keepDomains
params.description: If this is set, Experience Domains will not be removed.

params.name: removeVersions
params.description: If this is set, all Experience Versions and their contents will be removed (except for develop).

params.name: keepViews
params.description: If this is set, Experience Views (in the develop version) will not be removed.

params.name: keepEndpoints
params.description: If this is set, Experience Endpoints (in the develop version) will not be removed.

params.name: removeWorkflows
params.description: If this is set, all Experience Workflows (in the develop version) will ve removed.

items.docs: Deletes Multiple Parts of an Experience Including Users, Groups, Slugs, Domains, Versions, Endpoints, Views, and Workflows
